summary: Rule chunk from Gamemastering Paranoia page 97, chunk 6.

mechanics.raw_text:
A reluctance to role- play molecules wafting about may deter the raext clone generation from a repeat of their predecessors’ trigger-happy behavior. IF the clones show the same criminal disregard or public safety and property, repeat the first step, but summon the third set of clones directly to Internal Security for a “weapons inspection.” There the PCs are relieved of their weapons, and IntSec techs in- stall remote-control switches in each of them, The weapons are returned, and a leader is assigned — the sanest player — and given a device that turns the other characters’ ‘weapons on and off. The leader is also breveted to a higher security clearance and given Kevlar armor. Henceforth the PC weapons only function at the whim of the sanest player. Alternatively, IntSec might in- stall surgical implants that cause the PCs to explode or caper merrily when the leader 
7
